case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE MENDOZA NANEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT JOSE MEDOZA NANEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED OCT-09-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NANEZ, JOSE MENDOZA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NANEZ, JOSE MENDOZA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NANEZ, JOSE MENDOZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-28-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
